name: Gran Weatherwax
ability: Once per game, during the day, visit the Storyteller to give them advice to help your team win. They say if they intend to follow it.

name: Tiffany Aching
ability: On the last day, your vote counts twice and you may vote even if dead.

name: Nanny Ogg
ability: You start the game knowing two players. Each night*, you learn what they get up to.

name: Magrat Garlick
ability: Each night, learn a player. They have something in common with the player learned the previous night. You may guess what it is and will learn if you are correct. [+0/1 outsider]
otherNightReminder: Learn a player with something in common.

name: Mustrum Ridcully
ability: Each night*, learn if either of your living neighbors nominated an evil player.

name: Corporal Carrot
ability: Once per game, during the day, privately ask another player a yes or no question.

name: Sam Vimes
ability: You cannot die at night. If you nominate and execute an evil player, town learns this and you become drunk.

name: Twoflower
ability: Each night*, choose a player to become a traveller until dusk. Evil players retain their abilities.
otherNightReminder: Choose a player and a traveller

name: Sergeant Angua
ability: Once per game, at night*, you may choose an alive player. If they are evil, that player dies. The first time anybody is Mad that you are Angua, you are executed, even if dead.

name: Tomjon
ability: Once per game, at night, choose a non-demon character: You become that character until dusk. They may become drunk if in play.

name: Moist von Lipwig
ability: If you are chosen to be Vetinari's pawn, you choose the target if you succeed. [+Vetinari]

name: Dorfl
ability: At the start of the game, learn a good player. You may only vote if they are voting too. You cannot die to execution.

name: Hex
ability: You start knowing 4 players, at least one of which is evil. Whenever one dies, you learn their alignment.

name: Rincewind
ability: Once per game, make a wish that will backfire and probably kill you. If you die, you must wish.

name: Nobby Nobbs
ability: You may register as anything to anybody at any time. Even yourself.

name: C.M.O.T. Dibbler
ability: Once per game, even if dead, sell somebody a sausage: If they eat it, they gain an off-script outsider's ability. If they are evil, you are evil. If you dont sell a sausage, you lose the game, even if dead.

name: Chrysoprase
ability: On night X, all Townsfolk are drunk until dusk, even if dead. [X Outsiders]

name: Susan
ability: Grandfather wants the best for you. You can have his bluffs. If you die, evil loses.

name: Lord Downey
ability: Each night, choose a player: They are poisoned until dusk. If you nominate them tomorrow, they die.
otherNightReminder: Choose a player to poison. Kill if nominated.

name: Dr. Whiteface
ability: Each night, choose a player: They must be funny or die the following night. [+1 outsider]
firstNightReminder: Choose a player to be funny.
otherNightReminder: Choose a player to be funny. The other one might die.

name: Flannelfoot
ability: Each night*, choose a new player. They have no ability and their vote counts negatively until dusk.

name: Death
ability: Once per day, publicly kill a player who had a private conversation with you. Nobody can decline your calls. You are immune to all abilities, dying, and don't count as a player. [+Susan]

name: Vetinari
ability: At the start of the game, look at the Grimoire. Each night, predict whether the town will execute, that a specific player will nominate last, and whether a specific player will vote. Each night*, kill a player for correct guesses.

name: The Cunning Man
ability: Each night, choose 2 players: tomorrow, the 1st player is mad that the 2nd is evil, or one or both might die. If all witches die, Evil wins. [+2 witches]

name: Mr Slant
ability: Each night, choose a player: learn their character then slightly reword it. The previously chosen player dies then becomes normal. [+1/-1 outsider]
